messages.content:
翻译
凡是因前端导致的线上问题，统称为线上 Issue，统计口径：数量 / 月；达成线上事故准入标准的，称为线上 Incident，统计口径：数量 / 季度。

All online problems caused by the front-end are collectively referred to as online issues, with statistical metrics being quantity per month. Those that meet the admission criteria for online incidents are referred to as online incidents, with statistical metrics being quantity per quarter.

翻译
凡是因前端导致的线上问题，统称为线上 Issue，其中造成核心流程不可用，或页面频繁白屏的，称为严重问题，统计口径：数量 / 月；达成线上事故准入标准的，称为线上 Incident，统计口径：数量 / 季度。

All online problems caused by the front-end are collectively referred to as online issues. Among them, those that cause the core process to be unavailable or frequent page white screens are considered serious problems, and the statistical metric is quantity per month. Those that meet the admission criteria for online incidents are referred to as online incidents, with statistical metric being quantity per quarter.

翻译
针对严重问题（如页面白屏、崩溃）和核心业务链路覆盖 E2E 测试，统计口径：E2E 覆盖页面 / 总页面数。
For serious issues such as page white screens and crashes, and for end-to-end testing of core business processes, the statistical metric is the E2E coverage page/ total number of pages.
当告警发生之后，值班人需要在预期的时间（不同级别有不同的响应时效）内响应告警，统计口径：及时响应次数 / 告警次数（同类去重）。

After an alarm occurs, the on-duty personnel are expected to respond to the alarm within a certain time frame (different levels have different response time limits), and statistical metrics are timely response times/total number of alarms (same type and de-duplicated).

翻译
质量指标体系建设
Construction of quality indicators system.
根据质量指标体系的要求，实现质量指标收集的自动化和高效采集，并以周报、月报的形式持续跟进质量情况。

According to the requirements of the quality indicators system, achieve automated and efficient collection of quality indicators, and continuously follow up on the quality situation in the form of weekly and monthly reports.

翻译
E2E 测试主要覆盖严重问题以及核心数据链路，有助于两个方面：
1. 在发布之前做自动化回归，让严重问题被提前发现；
2. 在线上做定期的巡检，作为线上监控的辅助；

主要包含以下几点：
1. 改善告警卡片的可读性，从告警消息即可快速判断问题根因；
2. 具备自动响应能力，当问题出现时能根据问题判断自动拉群、拉人，加速问题处理；
3. 具备一定的自动定位能力，能根据问题特征做关联查询，帮助定位近期发布；
抱歉，可能您忘记提问了，有什么需要我翻译的吗？

翻译
- Pagepass支持InAPP（一些平台倾向使用Pagepass实现）
- Pagepass supports InAPP (some platforms tend to use Pagepass to achieve this).
- 自动化的Slardar数据打通方案
- Automated data integration solution for Slardar.

翻译
- E2E 测试覆盖
  - Arena、Agency、Wallet的web端严重问题覆盖率>90%
- 监控归因平台
  - 产出PSM发布记录查询工具的demo

- E2E test coverage
  - Arena, Agency, and Wallet web end serious problem coverage rate > 90%
- Monitoring attribution platform
  - Created a demo of PSM release record query tool.

- E2E test coverage
- Arena, Agency, and Wallet web end serious problem coverage rate > 90%
- Monitoring attribution platform
- Created a demo of PSM release record query tool.

These are several achievements or tasks, which can be translated as follows:

- E2E测试覆盖：
  - Arena、Agency和Wallet的Web端严重问题覆盖率超过90%。
- 监控归因平台：
  - 已经创建了PSM发布记录查询工具的演示版。

- 质量指标体系建设
  - 形成季度报的产出机制
  - 产出自动化质量指标采集能力的方案
- E2E 测试覆盖
  - 各平台严重问题覆盖率>80%，并完成部分用例在流水线的接入
- 监控归因平台
  - 实现PSM发布记录查询工具的高可用性
  - 告警归因服务打通Slardar数据，具备一定的自动定位能力

- Construction of quality indicators system
  - Establishment of quarterly report output mechanism
  - Production of automated quality indicators collection scheme
- E2E test coverage
  - Serious problem coverage rate > 80% for each platform, and completion of some test cases' integration in the pipeline
- Monitoring attribution platform
  - Achieved high availability of PSM release record query tool
  - Connected the alarm attribution service with Slardar data and possessed certain automatic positioning capability

- 落地质量指标的自动化采集能力
- 产出度量平台（数据可视化）调研方案

- Implementation of automated collection capability for quality indicators
- Production of research proposal for metrics platform (data visualization)

- 各平台严重问题覆盖率100%，核心链路覆盖率>60%
- 完成web和InAPP端严重问题和核心链路流水线的接入

- 100% serious problem coverage rate for each platform, core link coverage rate > 60%
- Completed the integration of serious problems and core link pipeline for web and InAPP ends.

- 具备拉群等自动化响应能力
- 支持手动触发告警归因服务

- Equipped with automated response capabilities such as pulling in groups
- Support manual trigger of alarm attribution service.
- 各业务形成用例保鲜机制
- Each business has established a mechanism to preserve test cases.
- 根据需求接入Tea等更多平台
- Integrate more platforms such as Tea according to requirements.
- 基于历史问题，实现较为完整的归因规则沉淀
- Based on historical problems, implement a more complete attribution rule accumulation.
